title: Added Local Studio Public Link Helper
summary: Added runtime-config site bases and a Studio navigation helper for resolving public-content links through the local public Jekyll preview or production base.
effect: The local Studio runtime now advertises public_preview and production site bases. Migrated routes can call buildPublicSiteUrl(...) to send public-content links to the local Jekyll preview by default or to dotlineform.com for explicit live-site actions. The migrated per-series tag editor uses the helper for public series and work header links.
verification: Python compile checks passed for scripts/studio/studio_app_config.py, tests/python/test_studio_app_server.py, and tests/smoke/local_studio_navigation_adapter.py
tests/smoke/local_studio_app_tag_routes.py passed with loopback server permissions and checks that per-series editor public links use the public-preview base
